Commander.name: Commander
Commander.equipped_with: A Shas'el is a single character model and equipped with: -.

option_groups.header: Can be equipped with up to two of the following
One Shas'el per army can be upgraded to a Shas'o for +15 points.
May pick up to two SUPPORT SYSTEMS from the armory.
May buy a Drone controller for +0 points and up to two Tau Drones in any combination.

abilities: Supporting Fire
Crisis bodyguard: The Commander may join a unit of Crisis Honor Guard.
Shas'o: May be equipped with one additional weapon and SUPPORT SYSTEM each.

Ethereal.name: Ethereal
Ethereal.equipped_with: An Ethereal is a single character model and equipped with: Equalisers.

option_groups.header: Can swap the Equalisers
One Ethereal per army can be upgraded to a Revered Ethereal for +15 points.
May buy a Drone controller for +0 points and up to two Tau Drones in any combination.

abilities: Command squad, Supporting Fire
Failure is not an option: Friendly units within 12" may use the Ethereal's Leadership value.

Serene unifier: The model can invoke 1 invocation per turn. An invocation is successfully invoked on a roll of 3+. It knows all the powers from the list of Invocations of the Ethereals. Each Ethereal can only use each power once per battle round.
Revered Ethereal: The model can invoke 1 additional invocation per turn.

Ethereal Guard.name: Ethereal Guard
Ethereal Guard.equipped_with: Each Ethereal Guard is equipped with: Equalisers.

option_groups.header: 1 unit of Ethereal Guard can be taken for each Ethereal. Does not occupy an HQ slot.
Each model can swap the Equalisers

abilities: Bodyguard, Command squad, Supporting Fire
Honor Guard: Ethereal Guards do not prevent an Ethereal from joining another unit. They will go with him!

Kroot Master Shaper.name: Kroot Master Shaper
Kroot Master Shaper.equipped_with: A Master Shaper is equipped with: -.

option_groups.header: May be equipped with up to two of the following
One Master Shaper per army can be upgraded to a Shaper Chief for +15 points.
May be upgraded to one of the following

abilities: Infiltrator, Supporting Fire, Use Cover

Evolutionary Adaptation: A Master Shaper may assign a free Signature Evolutionary Adaptation trait to itself and one other friendly Kroot unit at the start of deployment. It may not assign a Signature Evolutionary Adaptation the army has already chosen.
Shaper Chief: A Shaper Chief may assign its Evolutionary Adaptation to an additional friendly Kroot unit.
Upgrades
Flesh Shaper: The model and its attached unit gain "Deflagrate(6+)" for all melee attacks.
Trail Shaper: After all units have been placed in the Deployment phase, you may remove and redeploy this model and its attached unit.
War Shaper: The model and its attached unit automatically remove all Battleshock tokens during each Reinforcement phase.

Sub-Commander.name: Sub-Commander
Sub-Commander.equipped_with: A Sub-Commander is a single character model and equipped with: Photon grenades; Pulse rifle; Pulse pistol.

option_groups.header: For every unit of Commander or Ethereal, one Sub-Commander unit may be taken without using a HQ slot.
May be upgraded to one of the following
May swap the Pulse rifle
May take a Markerlight for +10 points.
May buy a Drone controller for +0 points and up to two Tau Drones in any combination.

abilities: Command squad, Squadron, Supporting Fire
Upgrades:
Cadre Fireblade: All ranged weapons of the Cadre Fireblade and its attached unit gain the "Deflagrate(6+)" ability.
Darkstrider: All Markerlights of Darkstrider and his attached unit gain +6" range. Darkstrider has the "Infiltrator" and "Vanguard" ability.

Longstrike: The model must start the game inside a Hammerhead unit (even though the vehicle does not have a transport capacity!) and can't disembark until it is destroyed. The Hammerhead that is chosen improves its Ballistic Skill by +1.

abilities: Supporting Fire

The Long-quill may swap their Kroot rifle

abilities: Infiltrator, Supporting Fire, Use Cover

Strike Team.equipped_with: All Fire Warriors and the Fire Warrior Shas'la are equipped with: Photon grenades; Pulse rifle; Pulse pistol.

Support Turrets.name: Support Turrets
Support Turrets.equipped_with: A Support Turret is a single model and equipped with: Flamer.

option_groups.header: Can only be selected if at least one other "Troops" unit is being taken. Can't be a mandatory unit selection.
Each Support turret may swap its Flamer

abilities: Supporting Fire

Deployment: Support Turrets always start in reserves and arrive whenever the controlling player wants to and in whatever quantity. Do not make reserve rolls for Support Turrets. During each Reinforcement phase, one Support Turret per Breacher or Strike Team can be placed anywhere within 3" of any Breacher or Strike Team. If a Breacher or Strike team is currently transported within a Devilfish, the Support Turret can be placed within 3" of the Devilfish. Support Turrets count as being completely immobilised after setup.

Expanding the sphere of influence: If a Support Turret is placed on a mission objective that was secured by a Troop selection (via the "Objective secured!" ability), it will still control the mission objective, even if an enemy unit is standing on it. This means all Support Turrets on an objective need to be destroyed, before the enemy may capture or contest the point!

abilities: Infiltrator, Supporting Fire

Drone protocols: Drones are ignored when determining the unit's most used Toughness and Defensive rules. They move as fast as the unit they are attached to. They are considered as being part of the model that controls them. Drones controlled by a Drone controller can not be removed as casualties.
Shrouded: Stealth Drones confer the ability "Stealth" and "Use cover" to themselves and their attached units.

abilities: Infiltrator, Supporting Fire, Use Cover

Pech'ra: All ranged weapons carried by the unit gain the "Sunder(1)" ability.
Sniper: Models with a Kroot hunting rifle receive a +1 bonus to their BS value.

weapons.name: Dawn blade
weapons.abilities: AT(2), Furious Charge, Flurry(2), Terrifying(-1), Unique, Unwieldy

weapons.name: Hunting javelin
weapons.abilities: Only for Kroot Shapers with Krootox steed

profiles.name: Charge
profiles.abilities: AT(1), Quick(+1), Can only be used with a Charge order

weapons.name: Onager gauntlet
weapons.abilities: AT(4), Life curse, Slow(-2), Tankhunter, Unique, Unwieldy

equipment.name: Blademasterᴵ
equipment.desc: The model may chose to either gain the "Armor piercing(5+)" or "Parry" ability during each activation. "Parry" is the default ability. Only for Ethereals. Unique.

equipment.name: Blood of the Stalkerᴵ
equipment.desc: When this model and its attached unit are set up as Infiltrators, they may be set up 6" closer to enemy units than normal. Kroot only.

equipment.name: Bonding knifeᴵ
equipment.desc: The model and its unit may re-roll failed Leadership tests.

equipment.name: Drone controllerᴵ
equipment.desc: The model can be accompanied by up to two Tau Drones. The Drones are subject to "Drone protocols" (see Tau Drones).

equipment.name: Ejection system
equipment.desc: If the model loses its last wound, replace it with a pilot. The model loses 2 Strength, 2 Toughness, got 1 Wound and a Pulse pistol.

equipment.name: Failsafe detonatorᴵ
equipment.desc: Activate when the model or its unit are fleeing from melee. Move the unit as normal, while the model stays in place. All remaining models within 6" suffer an automatic hit with Strength 8, AP 0, Damage 1. Remaining units may not pursue the fleeing unit. Remove the model that used the Failsafe detonator afterwards.

equipment.name: Hover droneᴵ
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" Movement, +1 Toughness, +1 Wound and the "Jet bike" ability. Only for Ethereals.

equipment.name: Iridium armor plate
equipment.desc: The model gains a 2+ armor safe and loses 6" movement. Cant' be combined with other battlesuits.

equipment.name: Knarloc steedᴵ
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" Movement, +2 Toughness, +1 Wound, a 5+ Save, a Knarloc talons, the "Vanguard" ability, and changes its unit type to "Bike". Kroot infantry only.

equipment.name: Kroothawk Totemᴵ
equipment.desc: This model's controller may re-roll one of their dice in each Initiative phase. Unique. Kroot only.

equipment.name: Krootox steedᴵ
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" Movement, +2 Strength, +2 Toughness, +2 Wounds, a 5+ Save and the "Bike" ability. Only for Kroot Shapers.

equipment.name: Krootox steedᴵ
equipment.desc: The model gains +2 Strength, +2 Toughness, +2 Wounds, a 5+ Save, a Krootox fist, and changes its unit type to "Monstrous Infantry". Kroot infantry only.

equipment.name: Mark of the Favored Childᴵ
equipment.desc: The model gains a 4+ invulnerable save. Unique. Kroot only.

equipment.name: Markerlightᴵ
equipment.desc: The model gains a Markerlight, see Index. Only for Infantry.

equipment.name: Master-crafted suit
equipment.desc: The model gains a 2+ save. Can be combined with other battlesuits.

equipment.name: Master-crafted weaponᴵ
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll one to hit roll per activation. Must be purchased for each weapon seperately.

equipment.name: No longer flesh and blood
equipment.desc: The model gains a Leadership value of 10. Can't be given to a mandatory HQ selection. Unique.

equipment.name: Paradox of Dualityᴵ
equipment.desc: Roll 1D6 after suffering an unsaved Wound. If the roll is lower than the inversed AP of the weapon, the damage is nullified. Example: If a weapon with AP:-3 causes the wound, the roll needs to be 1 or 2 to be successfull (lower than 3). A 6 is always a failure. Only for Ethereals. Unique.

equipment.name: Pech'raᴵ
equipment.desc: All ranged weapons carried by this model and its accompanied unit gain the "Sunder(1)" ability. Kroot only.

equipment.name: Prototype systemᴵ
equipment.desc:
One weapon of the model gains one of the following:
- Additional +6" Range (only for ranged weapons)
- Additional +1 Strength
- Additional -1 AP
- Additional +1 AT
Every enhancement is unique per army. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Puretide engram neurochipᴵ
equipment.desc: During your activation, pick one ability: Counter-attack, Favored enemy, Furious charge or Tank hunter. The ability is active for the model and its attached unit until their next activation. Unique

equipment.name: Stimulant injectorᴵ
equipment.desc: The model gains a 5+ invulnerability save. Does not work against weapons with strength 8 and above.

equipment.name: Surefoot Charmᴵ
equipment.desc: This model and its attached unit gains the "Haste(2")" ability. Kroot only.

equipment.name: Swordsman honoursᴵ
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Weapon skill.

equipment.name: Tactical philosophiesᴵ
equipment.desc:
Select and announce which one of the philosophies you use at the beginning of the deployment. Unique.

1. Kauyon
- Select up to one mission objective or friendly unit as "bait" in any combination for every started 1500 points of game size and announce them to all other players after you decided who places the first unit in the deployment phase.
- All friendly units (except the bait itself) gain +1 Strength for ranged attacks against enemy units that are within 6" range of any bait.

2. Mont'ka
- All units may be set up using the rules for "Deep strike".
- If a unit already got this ability, it reduces the scatter distance by 1D6 for itself.
- In addition to the regular reserve rolls, one unit automatically arrives from reserves each round.

3. Rinyon
- All units get the "Outflank" ability.
- All units automatically advance 6" instead of rolling for it.

4. Rip'yka
- Each time after a unit from this codex shoots at an enemy unit, the enemy unit receives two Markerlight tokens afterwards.

equipment.name: Talisman protection chip
equipment.desc: The model may attempt to deny one psychic power per battle round and receives a +1 bonus to the roll.

equipment.name: Teleport homing beaconᴵ
equipment.desc: A friendly unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep strike does not scatter. The Teleport homer must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: Trophyᴵ
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Terrifying(-1)".

equipment.name: Wingsᴵ
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" Movement and changes its unit type to "Jump Pack Infantry". Kroot infantry only.

equipment.name: XV22 Stalker battlesuit
equipment.desc: The models gains the +1 Initiative, as well as the "Infiltrator" and "Stealth" ability. Can't be combined with other battlesuits.

equipment.name: XV81 Crisis battlesuit
equipment.desc: The model gains a Smart missile system. Can't be combined with other battlesuits.

equipment.name: XV84 Crisis battlesuit
equipment.desc: The model gains a Markerlight and a Target Lock. Can't be combined with other battlesuits.

equipment.name: XV85 Enforcer battlesuit
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Wound and a 2+ armor save. Additionally, it may select one more weapon or support system. Can't be combined with other battlesuits.

equipment.name: XV86 Coldstar battlesuit
equipment.desc: The models gains +1 Wound, the "Jetbike" unit type and the "Hit & Run" ability. Can't be combined with other battlesuits.

equipment.name: XV86 Supernova battlesuit
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Wound, +1 Attack, +1 Initiative and becomes a "Monstrous Creature". Can't be combined with other battlesuits.

equipment.name: Blacksun filterᴵ
equipment.desc: The model ignores the -1 to hit modifier for cover.

equipment.name: Command and control nodeᴵ
equipment.desc: The army adds +1 to rolls during the Initative and Rally phase.

equipment.name: Counterfire defence system
equipment.desc: Instead of using its own weapons, the model may count as being in cover until its next activation.

equipment.name: Early warning override
equipment.desc: The model ignores the -1 to hit modifier for Defensive fire.

equipment.name: Earth caste pilot array
equipment.desc: The model gains a 4+ save against losing a wound from Overheating.

equipment.name: Multi-trackerᴵ
equipment.desc: The model gains a +1 to hit modifier, if it is shooting at a target consisting of 6 or more models.

equipment.name: Neuroweb system jammer
equipment.desc: Equipment such as icons or homing beacons do not function within 6" of the model. Additionally, units arriving via deepstrike that land within 12" roll 4D6 instead of 2D6 for scattering.

equipment.name: Photon casterᴵ
equipment.desc: Reduce enemy Charge movements that target the model or its attached unit by 2".

equipment.name: Positional relayᴵ
equipment.desc: The army adds +1 to rolls during the Reinforcement phase. Not cumulative with itself.

equipment.name: Repulsor impact fieldᴵ
equipment.desc: After finishing a charge move, the enemy unit suffers one automatic wound with S:4 AP:0 D:1 for every model that made it into base contact with this model.

equipment.name: Shield generatorᴵ
equipment.desc: The model gains a 4+ invulnerability save.

equipment.name: Target lock
equipment.desc: The model does not have to declare its ranged weapons at all targets before firing, and can choose a new target for each weapon.

equipment.name: Vectored retro-thrusters
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Hit & Run" ability.

equipment.name: Velocity tracker
equipment.desc: All weapons of the model gain the "Anti-Air" ability.

equipment.name: Blacksun filter
equipment.desc: The model ignores the -1 to hit modifier for cover.

equipment.name: Decoy launchers
equipment.desc: The model ignores the first "Crew Shaken" vehicle damage each round.

equipment.name: Disruption pod
equipment.desc: Enemy units targeting this model from 12" or further away reduce their weapon range by 6".

equipment.name: Failsafe detonator
equipment.desc: Activate when the model or its unit are fleeing from melee. Move the unit as normal, while the model stays in place. All remaining models within 6" suffer an automatic hit with Strength 8, AP 0, Damage 1. Remaining units may not pursue the fleeing unit. Remove the model that used the Failsafe detonator afterwards.

equipment.name: Flechette discharger
equipment.desc: Enemy models are automatically wounded with S:4 AP:0 D:1 in melee on a roll of 4+. Roll for each model in direct base contact. This is done at Initiative 10.

equipment.name: Jammer
equipment.desc: Equipment such as icons or homing beacons do not function within 6" of the model. Additionally, units arriving via deepstrike that land within 12" roll 4D6 instead of 2D6 for scattering.

equipment.name: Landing gear
equipment.desc: In every turn where the model does not move, it loses its Anti-Grav rule until the its next activation.

equipment.name: Multi-tracker
equipment.desc: The model gains a +1 to hit modifier, if it is shooting at a target consisting of 6 or more models.

equipment.name: Seeker missile
equipment.desc: The model gains a Seeker missile. The model may shoot once per game a Seeker missile with this profile: Range 120", Heavy 1, Strength 8, AP -3, Damage 2, Anti-Air, AT(2). May be taken up to 2 times per model.

equipment.name: Smoke Launcher
equipment.desc:
The model can use its Smoke Launcher once per game:
- During normal activation, instead of firing weapons.
- If it has not yet carried out its order this round and is targeted by an enemy unit. The order is consumed by doing so.
Enemy units can only deal glancing hits with ranged attacks until the next activation.

equipment.name: Target lock
equipment.desc: The model does not have to declare its ranged weapons at all targets before firing, and can choose a new target for each weapon.

equipment.name: Academy Luminary
equipment.desc: You gain an additional 0,25 Victory Points (VP) from secondary objectives. Unique. Vior’la Sept only.

equipment.name: For the Greater Good
equipment.desc: The model's Invocation range is increased to 36". Additionally, it may target two friendly units at the same time with each Invocation. Unique. T'au Sept only.

equipment.name: Grav-Inhibitor Field
equipment.desc: Select one enemy unit in direct base contact. The unit suffers a -1 penalty to its Initiative for the remaining battleround. Unique. Sa’cea Sept only.

equipment.name: Integrated Auxiliaries
equipment.desc: Allied units benefit of the effect from Tactical philosophies. Unique. Dal’yth Sept only.

equipment.name: Master of the Killing Blow
equipment.desc: During this model's activation, enemy units within 12" are treated as having one more Markerlight token on them than they actually do. Unique. Farsight Enclaves only.

equipment.name: Nomadic Hunter
equipment.desc: This model and its attached unit may shoot "Heavy" weapons with a -1 penalty and "Rapid Fire" weapons at full range with a "Move & Shoot" order, and they may fire Assault weapons, Grenades, and Pistols without a to hit penalty with "Advance" and "Charge" orders. Unique. Kroot Kindred only.

equipment.name: Overdrive Power Systems
equipment.desc: All ranged weapons of the model gain +1 Strength. Unique. Bork’an Sept only.

archetypes.name: Farsight Enclave
archetypes.desc:
- Crisis Battlesuits can be taken as Troops.
- Any other Troop unit becomes Elite choices.
- The army may not include Ethereals. 
- One unit each of Broadside Battlesuits and Riptide Battlesuits can be taken with an HQ slot if they consist of a single model.

archetypes.name: Kroot Hunting Pack
archetypes.desc:
- Kroot Farstalkers gain the Objective Secured ability.
- One Kroot Master Shaper may be upgraded to be a Shaman for +10 points. 
- A Kroot Shaman is a Psyker and can cast 1 power and deny 1 power per battle round. It knows two powers from either the Biomancy or Divination disciplines.
- Only Kroot units count towards mandatory unit minimums in the army's AOP.
- Only Kroot units count towards the 25% Troops limitation.

archetypes.name: Stealth Cadre
archetypes.desc:
- Stealth Battlesuits can be taken as Troops.
- Stealth Battlesuits may equip each model with a Fusion blaster at the regular cost.
- Any other Troop unit becomes an Elite choice.
- For every 6 models of Stealth Shas'ui and/or Stealth Shas'vre, one Ghostkeel Battlesuit unit may be taken as Troops.
- Must select at least one Commander equipped with a XV22 Stalker battlesuit.

legacies.name: Devastating Counterstrike
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Farsight Enclaves in the Sept Armory.

legacies.name: Hunter's Instincts
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Kroot Kindred in the Sept Armory.

legacies.name: Masters of Urban Warfare
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Sa’cea Sept in the Sept Armory.

legacies.name: Strength of Conviction
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the T'au Sept in the Sept Armory.

legacies.name: Strike Fast
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Vior’la Sept in the Sept Armory.

legacies.name: Superior Craftsmanship
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Bork’an Sept in the Sept Armory.

legacies.name: Unifying Influence
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from the Dal’yth Sept in the Sept Armory.

traits.name: Advanced Miniaturization
traits.desc: Every modell with access to a SUPPORT SYSTEM may pick one additional SUPPORT SYSTEM at the regular cost.

traits.name: Blacklight Markers
traits.desc: All markerlights of the unit increase their range by 12". Only for units with at least one Markerlight.

traits.name: Calm under Pressure
traits.desc: The unit does not suffer the to hit penalty from Defensive Fire.

traits.name: Camouflage Experts
traits.desc: The unit gains the benefit of light cover until its first activation.

traits.name: Combined Expansion
traits.desc: The army must select a second Legacy. Each model may only select items from one Legacy armory.

traits.name: Defenders of the Cause
traits.desc: The unit's "Supporting Fire" ability increases its range to 12".

traits.name: Defensive Doctrines
traits.desc: If the unit gets charged by an enemy unit, all enemy melee weapons reduce their AP and AT by 1 to a minimum of 0.

traits.name: Disengangement Protocols
traits.desc: Roll 1D6 every time the unit tries to flee from melee combat. One enemy unit in direct base contact suffers the result as automatic wounds with S:4 AP:0 D:1.

traits.name: Evasive Maneuvers
traits.desc: If the unit moved at least 12" away from its current position at the beginning of the battle round, all models gain the "Deflect" ability. Only for Jump Pack units.

traits.name: Fire Caste Marksman
traits.desc: The unit gains the "Deflagrate(5+)" ability with Pulse weapons. Does not apply to "Heavy" weapons.

traits.name: Fire Saturation
traits.desc: Burst weapons gain a +1 bonus to hit rolls against targets within 12".

traits.name: Reliable Weaponry
traits.desc: The unit can re-roll one armor penetration or wound roll per activation.

traits.name: Signature Evolutionary Adaption
traits.desc:
Select one Adaptation that must be applied to all Kroot units:
- Bold: The model gains +1 Leadership.
- Chameleon: The model gains the "Deflect" ability.
- Fast Reflexes: The model gains +1 Initiative.
- Hyperactive Nymune Organ: The model gains the "Frenzy(2")" ability.
- Ork Hybrid: The model gains +1 Toughness.
- Sixth Sense: The model gains a 6+ invulnerability save.

traits.name: Swarm Controllers
traits.desc: Models with access to drones may buy up to three drones in any combination instead of two.

traits.name: Turbo Jets
traits.desc: The unit gains +2" Movement. Only for Jump Pack units.

Invocations of the Ethereals.name: Calm of Tides
Invocations of the Ethereals.effect: Friendly units within the area ignore all negative Leadership modifications.

Invocations of the Ethereals.name: Storm of Fire
Invocations of the Ethereals.effect: The target can fire one more shot per model with pulse weapons.

Invocations of the Ethereals.name: Sense of Stone
Invocations of the Ethereals.effect: The target receives a 5+ invulnerability save.

Invocations of the Ethereals.name: Zephyr's Grace
Invocations of the Ethereals.effect: The target gains +6" Movement and the "Move through cover" ability.
